title: Custom Disenchanter
description: Precision enchantment removal - keep what you want, remove what you don't.
body:
# ⚒️ Custom Disenchanter

## 🪄 Overview

**Custom Disenchanter** is a next-generation Minecraft mod that completely redefines enchantment management.  
Unlike the vanilla **Grindstone**, which removes _all_ enchantments, this mod introduces a dedicated **Disenchanter Block** — allowing you to **selectively extract** enchantments from your items with full control.

***

## ✨ Features

*   ✅ **Selective Enchantment Removal** — Remove specific enchantments without affecting others
*   🧭 **Intuitive GUI** — Easy-to-use interface for managing your enchanted items
*   🎒 **Custom Creative Tab** — Access all disenchanter-related items quickly
*   ⚙️ **Full Capability Support** — Inventory persists properly and supports hoppers
*   🌍 **Multiplayer Ready** — Works flawlessly in single-player and server environments

***

## 📜 Crafting Recipes

### 🔷 Recipe (Minecraft 1.17+)

![Recipe 1.17+](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1373178/description_3966fb38-5cd8-4cf8-abe4-3da85024f6e0.png)

### 🔶 Recipe (Minecraft 1.16.5 & below)

![Recipe 1.16.5-](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1373178/description_40b66cbd-b049-4320-a2f1-1977e7114c43.png)

***

## 🧰 In-Game Preview

![Preview](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1373178/description_f5a17e88-f3ae-4703-84cf-76d3349294c0.png)

***

## 🎮 How to Use

1.  Craft or obtain a **Disenchanter Block**
2.  Place it in your world
3.  Right-click to open the interface
4.  ⚠️ **Important:** You must have at least **one book** in your inventory to store removed enchantments
5.  Insert your enchanted item
6.  Select the enchantment(s) to remove
7.  Retrieve your modified item **and** the book containing the extracted enchantment(s)

***
